tagline: Sweet allure meets lethal heat in this peak-time bashment ba
liner: Step into the sweaty grip of a club where desire burns hotter than strobe lights. This anthem blends sultry female toasting with raw male vocals, weaving a narrative of lovers who are as deadly as they are delicious. Feel the chest-rattling 808s shake your floor and let rapid-fire call-and-response patterns build an intoxicating tension. It is not merely music; it is a sensory overload that captures the gritty energy of Dancehall culture at its most electric. Embrace the dangerous attraction, lose control in the drop, and ride out the chaos where heaven looks like hell.
worldCaption: A neon-drenched dancefloor where strobe lights meet sticky skin amidst the roar of sound systems blasting high-tempo Afro-Caribbean rhythms

bios.lead: Sultry lead voice teasing your soul with rapid-fire delivery.
bios.back: Raw male power backing her up in chaotic unison.
bios.drums: Sharp riddim keeps the floor shaking without ever missing a beat.
bios.perc: Explosive rhythms add texture to every sweaty dance step.
bios.bass: Overdriven low-end rattles your chest like a dangerous lover.
bios.synth: Cuts through the noise with siren FX and sharp melody lines.
bios.other: Gritty layers create an atmosphere of intoxicating sensory overload.
